items.title: Hujjat sarlavhasi
items.help_text: Metadata hujjatining sarlavhasi (bu tadqiqotning o'zi sarlavhasi bo'lishi mumkin). Metadata hujjati DDI metadata fayli (XML yoki JSON fayl) yaratilmoqda. The "Document title" geografik doirani qayd etishi kerak of the data collection as well as the qamrab olingan vaqt davri. Masalan: “DDI 2.5: Albania Living Standards Study 2012”.

items.title: Hujjat ID
items.help_text: Noyob identifikator for the metadata document. This identifier katalogda noyob bo'lishi kerak where the metadata are nashr qilish uchun mo'ljallangan. Idealy, identifikator global miqyosda ham noyob bo'lishi kerak. Bu quyidagidan farq qiladi the "Asosiy ID" in section Tadqiqot tavsifi / Sarlavha bayoni, although yaxshi amaliyot to generate identifiers that aniq bog'lanish o'rnatish between these two identifiers. The Document ID shuningdek o'z ichiga olishi mumkin the metadata hujjati versiya identifikatori. Masalan, if the "Asosiy IDentifier" of the study is “ALB_LSMS_2012”, the "Document ID" in the Metadata information could be “IHSN_DDI_v01_ALB_LSMS_2012” agar DDI metadata ishlab chiqarilgan bo'lsa the IHSN. Har bir tashkilot o'rnatishi kerak tizimli qoidalar to bunday IDlarni yaratish. Tekshirish qoidasi belgilanishi mumkin (muntazam ifoda yordamida) foydalanuvchi shablonlarida ma'lum ID formatini majburlash uchun. The identifier bo'sh joylarni o'z ichiga olmasligi mumkin.

items.title: Metadata ishlab chiqaruvchilar
items.help_text: Metadata ishlab chiqaruvchisi - bu metadata hujjati yaratilgan jarayonlar uchun moliyaviy va/yoki ma'muriy mas'uliyatga ega bo'lgan shaxs yoki tashkilot. Bu "Tavsiya etiladi" elementi. Katalog boshqaruvi maqsadlarida ishlab chiqaruvchi va metadata ishlab chiqarish sanasi haqidagi ma'lumot foydalidir.

props.title: Nomi
props.help_text: The name of shaxs yoki tashkilot ishlab chiqarishni boshqaradigan DDI metadata. Agar shaxslarning nomlari taqdim etilmasa due to an organization’s data protection rules, shaxsning unvoni, yoki anonimlashtirilgan identifikator, taqdim etilishi mumkin (yoki bu maydon bo'sh qoldirilishi mumkin agar boshqa variant mavjud bo'lmasa).

props.title: Qisqartma
props.help_text: Shaxsning bosh harflari, or the abbreviation of the organization’s name "Nomi" da qayd etilgan.

props.title: Tashkilot
props.help_text: "Nomi" da qayd etilgan shaxs yoki tashkilotning tashkilot.

props.title: Rol
props.help_text: "Nomi" da qayd etilgan shaxs yoki tashkilotning DDI metadata ishlab chiqarishdagi o'ziga xos roli.

items.title: Ishlab chiqarish sanasi
items.help_text: DDI metadata hujjati ishlab chiqarilgan sana (tarqatilgan yoki arxivlangan sana emas), afzal ISO 8601 formatida (YYYY-MM-DD yoki YYY-MM) kiritiladi. Sana formatini majburlash uchun foydalanuvchi shablonlarida tekshirish qoidasi belgilanishi mumkin. Bu "Tavsiya etiladi" elementi, chunki ishlab chiqaruvchi va metadata ishlab chiqarish sanasi haqidagi ma'lumot katalog boshqaruvi maqsadlarida foydalidir.

items.title: Versiya
items.help_text: Ma'lumotlar to'plamini hujjatlashtirish oddiy vazifa emas. DDI hujjatida xatolar yoki bo'shliqlarni aniqlashdan keyin yoki takomillashtirish yoki qo'shimcha ma'lumotlar bo'yicha takliflar olingandan keyin DDI metadata o'zgartirilishi mumkin. "Versiya" elementi va "Versiya sanasi", "Versiya mas'uliyati" va "Versiya eslatmalari" elementlari metadata hujjatining versiyasini tavsiflaydi. "Versiya" elementi metadata hujjatining versiya yorlig'ini kiritish uchun ishlatiladi, bu versiya yoki nashr sifatida ham taniladi. Masalan, "Versiya 1.1" yoki "v1.1".

items.title: Versiya sanasi
items.help_text: Metadata hujjatining (DDI fayl) ushbu versiyasi ishlab chiqarilgan sana, afzal ravishda aniq sanani ko'rsatadi. Bu odatda "Ishlab chiqarish sanasi" elementi bilan mos keladi. Sanani ISO 8601 sana formatida (YYYY-MM-DD yoki YYYY-MM yoki YYYY) kiritish tavsiya etiladi. Sanalarning mos formatda kiritilishini ta'minlash uchun moslashtirilgan shablonlarda tekshiruv qoidasini kiritish mumkin.

items.title: Versiya mas'uliyati
items.help_text: Metadata hujjatining ushbu versiyasi uchun mas'ul tashkilot yoki shaxs.

items.title: Versiya eslatmalari
items.help_text: Ushbu element metadata hujjatining ushbu versiyasi bo'yicha ma'lumot/izohni aniqlashtirish uchun ishlatilishi mumkin, masalan oldingi versiya bilan solishtirganda ushbu versiyada nima yangi yoki o'ziga xos ekanligini ko'rsatish uchun.

items.title: Asosiy ID
items.help_text: The "Asosiy ID" (also referred to as IDNO) is a unique identification number used to identify the study (survey, census or other). Noyob identifikator is required for cataloguing purpose, so this element is declared as "Required". The identifier will allow users to cite the dataset properly. The identifier must be unique within the catalog. Ideally, it should also be globally unique; the recommended option is to obtain a Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the study. Alternatively, the "Asosiy ID" can be constructed by an organization using a consistent scheme. The scheme could Masalan be “catalog-country-study-year-version”, where country is the 3-letter ISO country code, producer is the abbreviation of the producing agency, study is the study acronym, year is the reference year (or the year the study started), version is a version number. Using that scheme, the Uganda 2005 Demographic and Health Survey Masalan would have the following ID (where “MDA” stand for “My Data Archive”): MDA_UGA_DHS_2005_v01. Note that the schema allows you to provide more than one identifier for a same study (in element "Other identifiers"); a catalog-specific identifier is thus not incompatible with a globally unique identifier like a DOI. Tekshirish qoidasi belgilanishi mumkin (muntazam ifoda yordamida) foydalanuvchi shablonlarida ma'lum ID formatini majburlash uchun. The identifier bo'sh joylarni o'z ichiga olmasligi mumkin.

items.title: Boshqa identifikatorlar
items.help_text: This repeatable element is used to enter identifiers (IDs) other than the "Asosiy ID" (IDNO). It can Masalan be a Digital Object Identifier (DOI). The "Asosiy ID" can be repeated here (the "Asosiy ID" does not provide a "Type" parameter, so if a DOI or other standard ID type is used as main identifier, it is recommended to repeat it here with the identification of the type).

props.title: Turi
props.help_text: The type of identifier. Masalan: “DOI”.

props.title: Identifikator
props.help_text: The identifier itself.

items.title: Sarlavha
items.help_text: This element is "Required". Provide here the full authoritative title for the study. Make sure to use a unique name for each distinct study. The title should indicate the qamrab olingan vaqt davri. Masalan, in a country conducting monthly labor force surveys, the title of a study would be like “Labor Force Survey, December 2020”. When a survey spans two years (Masalan, a household income and expenditure survey conducted over a period of 12 months from June 2020 to June 2021), the range of years taqdim etilishi mumkin in the title, Masalan “Household Income and Expenditure Survey 2020-2021”. The title of a survey should be its official name as stated on the survey questionnaire or in other study documents (report, etc.). Including the country name in the title is optional (another metadata element is used to identify the reference countries). Pay attention to the consistent use of capitalization in the title.

items.title: Pastki sarlavha
items.help_text: The sub-title is a secondary title used to amplify or state certain limitations on the main title, Masalan to add information usually associated with a sequential qualifier for a survey. Masalan, we may have “[country] Universal Primary Education Project, Impact Evaluation Survey 2007” as Title, and “Baseline dataset” as Subtitle. Note that this information could also be entered as a Title with no Subtitle: “[country] Universal Primary Education Project, Impact Evaluation Survey 2007 - Baseline dataset”.

items.title: Muqobil sarlavha
items.help_text: The alternate title will typically be used to capture the abbreviation of the survey title. Many surveys are known and referred to by their acronym. The survey reference year(s) may be included. Masalan, the "Demographic and Health Survey 2012" would be abbreviated as "DHS 2012", or the "Living Standards Measurement Study 2020-2012" as "LSMS 2020-2021".

items.title: Tarjima qilingan sarlavha
items.help_text: In countries with more than one official language, a translation of the title may be provided here. Likewise, the translated title may simply be a translation into English from a country’s own language. Special characters should be properly displayed, such as accents and other stress marks or different alphabets.

items.title: Versiya nomi
items.help_text:
Versiya raqami, versiya yoki nashr sifatida ham taniladi. Versiya bayoni versiya raqamini va undan keyin versiya yorlig'ini o'z ichiga olishi kerak. Versiya raqami ma'lumotlar omborixonasi tomonidan qabul qilinadigan standart konventsiyaga amal qilishi kerak. Biz katta seriyalarni kasr chiziqining chap tomonidagi raqam bilan belgilashni tavsiya etamiz va bir xil seriyaning takrorlanishlarini nashrni aniqlaydigan ketma-ket raqam bilan belgilaymiz. Chap raqam masalan: (0) xom, tahrirlanmagan ma'lumotlar to'plami uchun; (1) tahrirlangan ma'lumotlar to'plami uchun, anonimlashtirilmagan, faqat ma'lumot ishlab chiqaruvchi agentlikda ichki foydalanish uchun mavjud; va (2) ikkinchi foydalanuvchilarga tarqatish uchun tayyorlangan tahrirlangan ma'lumotlar to'plami (ehtimol anonimlashtirilgan). Masalan:
- v0: Ma'lumotlarni qayta ishlash jarayonidan olingan asosiy xom ma'lumotlar, har qanday ma'lumotlarni tahrirlash amalga oshirilgunga qadar.
- v1.0: Tahrirlangan ma'lumotlar, birinchi takrorlash, faqat ichki foydalanish uchun.
- v1.1: Tahrirlangan ma'lumotlar, ikkinchi takrorlash, faqat ichki foydalanish uchun.
- v2.1: Tahrirlangan ma'lumotlar, anonimlashtirilgan va ommaviy tarqatish uchun paketlangan.

items.title: Versiya sanasi
items.help_text: The reference date for this version of the dataset. The use of the ISO 8601 standard is highly recommended for the formatting of the date (YYYY-MM-DD). A regular expression taqdim etilishi mumkin in "Validation rules" foydalanuvchi shablonlarida to validate the information entered in this element.

items.title: Versiya mas'uliyati
items.help_text: The person(s) or organization(s) responsible for this version of the study.

items.title: Notes on version
items.help_text: Version notes should provide a brief report on the changes made through the versioning process. The note should indicate how this version differs from other versions of the same dataset.

items.title: Muallif tashkilot

props.title: Nomi
props.help_text: The name of the person, corporate body, or agency responsible for the work’s substantive and intellectual content. The primary investigator will in most cases be an institution, but could also be an individual in the case of small-scale academic surveys. If persons are mentioned, use the appropriate format of Surname, First name.

props.title: Tashkilot
props.help_text: Tashkilot the person, corporate body, or agency "Nomi" da qayd etilgan.

items.help_text: The name and affiliation of the person, corporate body, or agency responsible for the study’s substantive and intellectual content (the "authoring entity" or “primary investigator”). Generally, in a survey, the authoring entity will be the institution implementing the survey. Repeat the element for each authoring entity, and enter the “Affiliation” when relevant. If various institutions have been equally involved as main investigators, then should all be listed. This only includes the agencies responsible for the implementation of the study, not sponsoring agencies or entities providing technical assistance (for which other metadata elements are available). The order in which authoring entities are listed is discretionary. It can be alphabetic or by significance of contribution. Individual persons can also be mentioned, if not prohibited by privacy protection rules.

items.title: Boshqa ishlab chiqaruvchilar

props.title: Nomi
props.help_text: The name of shaxs yoki tashkilot.

props.title: Qisqartma
props.help_text: The official abbreviation of the organization "Nomi" da qayd etilgan.

props.title: Tashkilot
props.help_text: "Nomi" da qayd etilgan shaxs yoki tashkilotning tashkilot.

props.title: Rol
props.help_text: A succinct description of the specific contribution by shaxs yoki tashkilot in the production of the data.

items.help_text: This field is used to list other parties and persons that have played a significant but not the leading technical role in implementing and producing the data (which will be listed in "Authoring entity"). Do not include here the financial sponsors, who should be listed in "Funding agencies".

items.title: Moliyalashtiruvchi tashkilotlar
items.help_text: The source(s) of funds for the production of the study. If different funding agencies sponsored different stages of the production process, use the role attribute to distinguish them.

props.title: Nomi
props.help_text: The name of the funding agency.

props.title: Qisqartma
props.help_text: The abbreviation (acronym) of the funding agency "Nomi" da qayd etilgan.

props.title: Grant number
props.help_text: The grant number. If an agency has provided more than one grant, list them all separated with a “;”.

props.title: Rol
props.help_text: The specific contribution of the funding agency "Nomi" da qayd etilgan. This element is used when multiple funding agencies are listed to distinguish their specific contributions.

items.title: Boshqa ishtirokchilar

props.title: Nomi
props.help_text: The name of shaxs yoki tashkilot.

props.title: Tashkilot
props.help_text: "Nomi" da qayd etilgan shaxs yoki tashkilotning tashkilot.

props.title: Rol
props.help_text: A brief description of O'ziga xos roli shaxs yoki tashkilot "Nomi" da qayd etilgan.

items.help_text: This element is used to acknowledge any other people and organizations that have in some form contributed to the study. This does not include other producers which should be listed in "Other producers", and financial sponsors which should be listed in the element "Funding agencies".

items.title: Ishlab chiqarish sanasi
items.help_text: This is the date (afzal ISO 8601 formatida kiritiladi: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM or YYYY) of the actual and final production of the version of the dataset being documented. At least the month and year should be provided. A regular expression can be entered foydalanuvchi shablonlarida to validate the information captured in this field.

items.title: Ishlab chiqarish joyi
items.help_text: Hujjatlashtirilayotgan ma'lumotlar to'plamini ishlab chiqargan tashkilotning manzili.

items.title: Mualliflik huquqi
items.help_text: Tadqiqot uchun tegishli darajadagi mualliflik huquqi bayoni.
Tadqiqotga ruxsat bergan agentlik, ruxsat sanasi va ruxsat bayoni haqida tuzilgan ma'lumot beradi
items.title: Tadqiqot ruxsatnomasi
Ruxsat sanasi
items.help_text: This element will be used when a special legislation is required to conduct the data collection (Masalan a Census Act) or when the approval of an Ethics Board or other body is required to collect the data. This and other related elements provide a way to capture structured information on the agency that authorized the study, the date of authorization, and the authorization statement. The "Authorization date" element is used to store the date when the authorization to conduct the study was granted. The date will preferably be entered in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM). Tekshirish qoidasi belgilanishi mumkin foydalanuvchi shablonlarida to enforce a specific date format.

items.title: Ruxsat beruvchi tashkilot

props.title: Nomi
props.help_text: Name of the agent or agency that authorized the study.

props.title: Tashkilot
props.help_text: The institutional affiliation of the authorizing agent or agency "Nomi" da qayd etilgan.

props.title: Qisqartma
props.help_text: The abbreviation of the authorizing agent’s or agency’s name.

items.help_text: This element will be used when a special legislation is required to conduct the data collection (Masalan a Census Act) or when the approval of an Ethics Board or other body is required to collect the data. This and other related elements provide a way to capture structured information on the agency that authorized the study, the date of authorization, and the authorization statement. This element is used to capture the identification (name, acronym, and affiliation) of the agency that authorized the study.

items.title: Ruxsat bayoni
items.help_text: This element will be used when a special legislation is required to conduct the data collection (Masalan a Census Act) or when the approval of an Ethics Board or other body is required to collect the data. This and other related elements provide a way to capture structured information on the agency that authorized the study, the date of authorization, and the authorization statement. This element is used to capture the text of the authorization (or a description and link to a document or other resource containing the authorization statement).

items.title: Seriya nomi
items.help_text: A study may be repeated at regular intervals (such as an annual labor force survey), or be part of an international survey program (such as the MICS, DHS, LSMS and others). The name of the series to which the study belongs is captured in this element. Masalan, "Living Standards Measurement Study (LSMS)" or "Demographic and Health Survey (DHS)" or "Multiple Indicator Cluster Survey VII (MICS7)". A description of the series taqdim etilishi mumkin in the element "Series information".

items.title: Seriya haqida ma'lumot
items.help_text: A study may be repeated at regular intervals (such as an annual labor force survey), or be part of an international survey program (such as the MICS, DHS, LSMS and others). The name of the series to which the study belongs is captured in this element. Masalan, "Living Standards Measurement Study (LSMS)" or "Demographic and Health Survey (DHS)" or "Multiple Indicator Cluster Survey VII (MICS7)". The name of the series is provided in element "Series name". The element "Series description" will contain a brief description of the characteristics of the series, including when it started, how many rounds were already implemented, and who is in charge would be provided here.

items.title: Ma'lumot turi
items.help_text: This field describes the main type of microdata generated by the study: survey data, census/enumeration data, aggregate data, clinical data, event/transaction data, program source code, machine-readable text, administrative records data, experimental data, psychological test, textual data, coded textual, coded documents, time budget diaries, observation data/ratings, process-produced data, etc. A controlled vocabulary should be used foydalanuvchi shablonlarida as this information may be used to build facets (filters) in a catalog user interface.

items.title: Annotatsiya
items.help_text: Ma'lumot yig'ishning maqsadi, tabiati va qamrovini, uning tarkibining o'ziga xos xususiyatlarini, qamrab olingan asosiy mavzu sohalarini va asosiy tadqiqotchi(lar) tadqiqotni o'tkazganda javob olishga harakat qilgan savollarni tasvirlovchi formatlanmagan xulosa. Xulosa ideal holda 50 dan 5000 tagacha belgi uzunligida bo'lishi kerak. Annotatsiya so'rovning maqsadlari, maqsadlari va mazmunini aniq bayon qilishi kerak. U tadqiqot haqida ma'lumotga ega bo'lgan tadqiqotchi yoki so'rov statistikasi tomonidan yozilishi kerak. Ushbu elementni kiritish tavsiya etiladi.

items.title: Kalit so'zlar

props.title: Keyword
props.help_text: A keyword (or phrase).

props.title: Vocabulary
props.help_text: The controlled vocabulary from which the keyword is extracted, if any.

props.title: URL
props.help_text: The URL of the controlled vocabulary from which the keyword is extracted, if any.

items.help_text: Kalit so'zlar ma'lumotlar to'plamining mohiyatini tasvirlaydigan so'zlar yoki iboralardir. Kalit so'zlarni qo'shish ma'lumotlarni topishni sezilarli darajada yaxshilashi mumkin va shuning uchun tavsiya etiladi. Kalit so'zlar resursning mazmuni yoki mavzusini umumlashtirishi va yaxshilashi mumkin. Kalit so'zlar standart tezaurusdan, afzal ravishda xalqaro, ko'p tilli tezaurusdan tanlanishi mumkin. Yoki ular mashinali o'rganish modellari tomonidan taklif qilinishi mumkin. Foydalanuvchi shablonlarida boshqariladigan lug'at ishlatilishi mumkin.

items.title: Mavzular

props.title: Topic
props.help_text: The label of the topic.

props.title: Vocabulary
props.help_text: The specification (name including the version and date) of the controlled vocabulary from which the topic is taken.

props.title: URL
props.help_text: A link (URL) to the controlled vocabulary website.

items.help_text: Topics indicate the broad substantive topic(s) that the dataset covers. A topic classification facilitates referencing and searches in electronic survey catalogs; topics should thus be selected from a standard controlled vocabulary, Masalan the CESSDA Topics classification (a typology of topics available in 11 languages), or the Journal of Economic Literature (JEL) Classification System. Note that you may combine topics from more than one controlled vocabulary.

items.title: Tahlil birligi
items.help_text: A study can have multiple units of analysis. This field will list the various units that can be analyzed. Masalan, a Living Standard Measurement Study (LSMS) may have collected data on households and their members (individuals), on dwelling characteristics, on prices in local markets, on household enterprises, on agricultural plots, and on characteristics of health and education facilities in the sample areas.

items.title: Olam
items.help_text: The universe is the group of persons (or other units of observations, like dwellings, facilities, or other) that are the object of the study and to which any analytic results refer. The universe will rarely cover the entire population of the country. Sample household surveys, Masalan, may not cover homeless, nomads, diplomats, community households. Population censuses do not cover diplomats. Facility surveys may be limited to facilities of a certain type (e.g., public schools). Try to provide the most detailed information possible on the population covered by the survey/census, focusing on excluded categories of the population. For household surveys, age, nationality, and residence commonly help to delineate a given universe, but any of a number of factors may be involved, such as sex, race, income, veteran status, criminal convictions, etc. In general, it should be possible to tell from the description of the universe whether a given individual or element (hypothetical or real) is a member of the population under study.

items.title: Vaqt davrlari
items.help_text: This refers to the time period (also known as span) covered by the data. It does not necessarily correspond to the dates of data collection (a specific element "Dates of data collection" is also available in the standard).

props.title: Start
props.help_text: The start date for the cycle being described. Enter the date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM or YYYY). Indicate open-ended dates with two decimal points (..)

props.title: End
props.help_text: The end date for the cycle being described. Enter the date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM or YYYY). Indicate open-ended dates with two decimal points (..)

props.title: Cycle
props.help_text: The "Cycle" attribute permits specification of the relevant cycle, wave, or round of data.

items.title: Mamlakat

props.title: Nomi
props.name: Country name
props.help_text: The country name, even in cases where the study does not cover the entire country.

props.title: Code
props.help_text: The abbreviation will contain a country code, preferably the 3-letter ISO 3166-1 country code.

items.help_text: Indicates the country or countries (or “economies”, or “territories”) covered in the study (but not the sub-national geographic areas). If the study covers more than one country, they will be entered separately. Consistent country names and spelling should be used across an organization (Masalan, if "Democratic Republic of Congo" is the recommended name for the organization, the information should should not be entered as "Congo, Democratic Republic", "Congo, Dem. Rep.", "DR Congo", or other option). foydalanuvchi shablonlarida, a controlled vocabulary can be set at the country name level, at the country code level, or at the combined name/code level.

Middle East and North Africa (IFC classification)
